Explanation:
The thread nominal sizes with their threads per inch (tpi) are:
- pg7: 20 (exclude, >16)
- pg9: 18 (exclude, >16)
- pg11: 18 (exclude, >16)
- pg13.5: 18 (exclude, >16)
- pg16: 18 (exclude, >16)
- pg21: 16 (include, ≤16)
- pg29: 16 (include, ≤16)
- pg36: 16 (include, ≤16)
- pg42: 16 (include, ≤16)
- pg48: 16 (include, ≤16)

There are 5 sizes with at most 16 tpi: pg21, pg29, pg36, pg42, pg48.
